---
title: "Examples of Participant Slides"
format: html
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

As part of our full, week-long courses we ask participants to complete a final slide summarizing what they were able to accomplish during the course. Each slide includes the participant's name and affiliation, a description of their project or objective, and a figure created using satellite data during the course. Participants also document the datasets and software used, and may include any challenges encountered or desired data that were not available. 

Here we showcase some slides that are representative of the broad usages and applications.

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML
import json

img_files = sorted(Path(".").glob("*.png"))

slides = [
    {
        "path": f"./{f.name}",
        "title": f.stem.replace("_", " ").upper()
    }
    for f in img_files
]

slides_json = json.dumps(slides)

html = f"""
<div class="slide-carousel-wrapper">
  <div class="slide-carousel">
    <button class="carousel-arrow" id="prevSlide" aria-label="Previous slide">&#10094;</button>

    <div class="carousel-stage">
      <img id="carouselImage" src="" alt="">
    </div>

    <button class="carousel-arrow" id="nextSlide" aria-label="Next slide">&#10095;</button>
  </div>

  <div class="carousel-meta">
    <span class="carousel-counter" id="carouselCounter"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.slide-carousel-wrapper {{
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 2rem auto;
  text-align: center;
}}

.slide-carousel {{
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 60px 1fr 60px;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  border: 2px solid #002f5d;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
}}

.carousel-stage {{
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
}}

.carousel-stage img {{
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  display: block;
}}

.carousel-arrow {{
  border: none;
  background: #002f5d;
  color: white;
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}}

.carousel-meta {{
  margin-top: 1rem;
}}

.carousel-counter {{
  display: inline-block;
  background: #002f5d;
  color: white;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}}

.carousel-title {{
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: #1f2937;
  font-family: sans-serif;
}}
</style>

<script>
(function() {{
  const slides = {slides_json};
  let currentIndex = 0;
  let autoAdvance = null;

  const imageEl = document.getElementById("carouselImage");
  const counterEl = document.getElementById("carouselCounter");
  const prevBtn = document.getElementById("prevSlide");
  const nextBtn = document.getElementById("nextSlide");

  function renderSlide(index) {{
    if (!slides.length) {{
      imageEl.style.display = "none";
      titleEl.textContent = "No slide images found.";
      counterEl.textContent = "";
      return;
    }}

    imageEl.style.display = "block";
    imageEl.src = slides[index].path;
    counterEl.textContent = `IMAGE ${{index + 1}} OF ${{slides.length}}`;
  }}

  function nextSlide() {{
    currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % slides.length;
    renderSlide(currentIndex);
  }}

  function prevSlide() {{
    currentIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length;
    renderSlide(currentIndex);
  }}

  function restartAutoAdvance() {{
    clearInterval(autoAdvance);
    autoAdvance = setInterval(nextSlide, 7000);
  }}

  prevBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {{
    prevSlide();
    restartAutoAdvance();
  }});

  nextBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {{
    nextSlide();
    restartAutoAdvance();
  }});

  renderSlide(currentIndex);

  if (slides.length > 1) {{
    autoAdvance = setInterval(nextSlide, 7000);
  }}
}})();
</script>
"""

HTML(html)
```
